name: hermes
notes: Skills and knowledge documents are copied from the main repository. Each skill may have its own runtime dependencies; check the individual SKILL.md files. Built-in capabilities: Skill Sync (Local mode) via `hermes skill-sync --help`; Loop Engineering with Sub-Agent orchestration (Fan-out/Fan-in), builder-checker pattern, 6 stop rules, tool-level isolation, L1/L2/L3 staged autonomy, and OpenClaw Gateway integration via `hermes loop --help`.
